creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
mlt and mlt++ got upgraded, and kdenlive depends on them

Fix: bump portrevision
this has to be applied AFTER ports/133827 (multimedia/mlt++ pr)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 1. install mlt/mlt++ 0.3.2 and kdenlive
2. upgrade mlt/mlt++ to 0.3.6
3. kdenlive will crash
